q: In a _______ motion, the object just moves in a circle.
In _______ motion, the object rotates about an axis.
The rotation of the earth about its own axis is a _______ motion.
The motion of the blades of a fan is a _______ motion.
The motion of a Ferris wheel is a _______ motion.
_______ body is a body that does not deform or change shape.
The angular acceleration is equal to zero when there is no change in _______.
The direction of the angular velocity of the second hand of the clock is _______ the clock face.
The direction of the angular acceleration of the second hand of the clock is _______.
The direction of the angular velocity of a disc speeding up clockwise is _______.
The direction of the angular velocity of a disc slowing down clockwise is _______.
The direction of the angular acceleration of a disc speeding up clockwise is _______.
The direction of the angular acceleration of a disc slowing down clockwise is _______.
For uniform circular motion, the direction of the _______ is towards the centre of the circular path.
For uniform circular motion, the direction of the _______ is tangential to the circular path.
The centripetal acceleration is present _______.
The two acceleration vectors $\vec{a}_{C}$ and $\vec{a}_{T}$ are _______ to each other.
The angle between a and $a_{C}$ is _______.
If the angular speed is decreasing, there is/are _______ acceleration(s).
If the angular speed is increasing, there is/are _______ acceleration(s).
If the angular speed is constant, there is/are _______ acceleration(s).
